items.title: Expand the first space-events landing pages
items.hypothesis: Dedicated launch and NASA live pages should outperform generic homepage cards for repeat visits and watch-clicks.
items.successMetric: Higher watch-click rate and repeat sessions from space pages over 28 days.
items.rollbackPlan: Freeze generation for weak topics and remove low-performing internal links.
items.notes: Human review required before enabling new page templates in production.
